commitResults.messageBody: refactor: Simplify models, improve parsing, and update messaging
docs: Update documentation to reflect recent changes

commitResults.messageTitle: Fix misleading add command preamble error (#298)
commitResults.messageBody:
When the user typed 'add sad n/sad p/88888888 e/sad@gmail.com a/sad',
the parser rejected the command with 'Missing required parameters',
which is misleading — the prefixes are all present but there is an
extra preamble ('sad') before them.

Throw the standard MESSAGE_INVALID_COMMAND_FORMAT with the usage
string instead, matching the convention used by other parsers
(ShowCommandParser, TagPoolCommandParser, etc.). The genuine
'no parameters at all' path still uses MESSAGE_MISSING_ALL.

commitResults.messageTitle: Clarify index range wording in error messages
commitResults.messageBody:
Replace ambiguous "between 1 and X" with "from 1 to X" in index
out-of-range error messages so that the bounds are unambiguously
inclusive. Updates production strings in Messages, DeleteNoteCommand,
DeleteRejectCommand, EditNoteCommand, and EditRejectCommand, plus the
matching assertions in their tests.

Fixes #288

commitResults.messageTitle: Report all duplicate prefixes in error message
commitResults.messageBody:
The duplicate-prefix error previously only named the first duplicated
prefix even when multiple prefixes were duplicated. Join all duplicated
prefixes into the message so the user sees every offending parameter.

Fixes #276

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: Resolve help UI, validation, and note issues
commitResults.messageBody:
- Fix Help window not displaying command output
- Add Ctrl+Q shortcut for application exit
- Add length validation with specific error for Email
- Warn when tag deletion affects existing candidates
- Sanitize note newlines during JSON deserialization
- Ensure notes are sorted chronologically after load

Improves usability, data integrity, and consistency.

commitResults.messageTitle: refactor: Simplify models, and update messaging
commitResults.messageBody:
- Remove timestamp handling from Note and related classes
- Simplify Email validation and constraints messaging
- Make prefix matching case-insensitive in ArgumentTokenizer
- Improve command messages and usage consistency (Help, Exit, Edit)
- Update UI behavior (Help window sizing, Ctrl+Q shortcut)
- Clean up tagpool warnings and parser error handling
- Align naming and branding ("AddressBook" → "Talently")

Improves consistency, simplifies logic, and enhances usability.

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: Standardize error messages across commands
commitResults.messageBody:
Align validation error messages for consistency and clarity.

- Add "Error: " prefix to Priority and Address constraints
- Improve Name constraint to require starting with a letter
- Clarify allowed characters in FindCommandParser (include spaces)
- Replace "cannot be empty" with "cannot be blank" in note parsing

Ensures consistent messaging.

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: Update documentation to reflect recent changes

commitResults.messageBody: Report all duplicate prefixes in error message
Clarify index range wording in error messages
Fix misleading add command preamble error (#298)
Fix undo/redo history corruption caused by sort commands and UG inconsistencies
Add tag pool input validation to filter command

commitResults.messageTitle: Handled gaps in undo/redo logic in the implementation of stateful history
commitResults.messageBody:
Particularly, that sort clears history of commands and renders previous
states unretrievable through undo/redo

commitResults.messageTitle: Edit UG to be more specific on undo/redo's output in GUI
Implement guardrail to reject non-existent tags as input to filter command
